title: Pünktchen und Anton
writer: Erich Kästner, Maria von der Osten-Sacken, Thomas Engel
actors: Hertha Feiler, Paul Klinger, Annie Rosar
plot: Despite their social differences, daughter of wealthy parents Luise (aka Pünktchen) befriends Anton, a boy who must earn his own money in order to support his sick mother and himself. Together they undergo different adventures, ev...
